title: Basic Discord Rich Presence
description: This is the basic rich presence orginally from uteamcore. Now its an extra project
body:
The is a basic discord rich presence mod. This function used to be in uteamcore, but is now a seperate mod.

Here is a screenshot of the discord rich presence when you are in the main menu:

It will update if you go into a world and show the dimension you are playing in. This mod is useful if you want to show your friends on discord what you are currently playing in minecraft.

  You can use the config to turn the discord rich presence off.

  This mod can be packed in every modpack you want.
[Sourcecode](https://github.com/MC-U-Team/Basic-Discord-Rich-Presence) is linked above and is available under Apache License 2.0.
Report Bugs on github.
